name: Recruiter: compose bulk InMail from a template ({Nombre} chip) — gated
description: Selects a project's ACTIVE candidates, opens the bulk InMail composer, clears the AI draft, and types the template {{body}} — replacing each literal {Nombre} token with the LinkedIn variable CHIP (via 'Insert variables'/'Insertar variables'). Sets the subject (handles the subject-reveal quirk). If send=false (default) it STOPS so the per-step snapshot proves recipients + message; if send=true it clicks Send (REAL InMail). Params: project_url, body, subject, send.
